reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14405517849871948423/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2taa01FUXphRTUzUzFsSGJtVTJiSEIxTW1OSE9XYxAB

reviews.comment:
Un desastre, abrían 7:00 hs, fui unos minutos más tarde, la mujer que atendía, estaba limpiando, me vió, nunca dejó de hacer sus cosas!
Entré, golpeé, llamé, me dijo que esperara, siguió haciendo sus cosas, después sacó un extintor, o sea, para cargar nafta, estuve 20 minutos y estaba solo.
Lamentable atención y pocas ganas de trabajar.

(Translated by Google)
A disaster. They opened at 7:00 AM, I arrived a few minutes late, and the woman who was supposed to be working was cleaning. She saw me, but never stopped what she was doing!
I went in, knocked, called, and she told me to wait. She just kept doing what she was doing, then she got out a fire extinguisher—I mean, to fill up the gas tank. I was there for 20 minutes and it was all alone. Terrible service and a real lack of enthusiasm for their work.

reviewReply.comment: Lamentamos lo sucedido y le pedimos disculpas. Gracias por hacernos saber y se tomarán medias al respecto. Saludos
